name: lien-monorepo
description: Lien - Local lexical code search and dependency analysis for AI assistants

scripts.build: npm run build -w @liendev/parser && npm run build -w @liendev/core && npm run build -w @liendev/review && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w @liendev/action
scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @liendev/parser && npm run build -w @liendev/core
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @liendev/parser -w @liendev/core -w @liendev/review && npm run typecheck -w packages/cli -w packages/review -w packages/action
scripts.test: npm run test -w @liendev/parser-native && npm run test -w @liendev/parser && npm run test -w @liendev/core && npm run test -w @liendev/review && npm run test -w packages/cli && npm run test -w @liendev/action
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck

author: Alf Henderson
